nasb.text: But if it is by grace, it is no longer on the basis of works, otherwise grace is no longer grace.

esv.text: But if it is by grace, it is no longer on the basis of works; otherwise grace would no longer be grace.

cnv.text: 既然是靠著恩典，就不再是由於行為了；不然的話，恩典就不再是恩典了。

ccb.text: 既然说是出于恩典，就不再基于行为，不然恩典就不再是恩典了。

csbs.text: 既然藉着恩典，就不再本于行为了；否则，恩典就不再是恩典了。
